<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''Millenium Warriors''' ('''(MW)''') (October 2004 - December 2004) was a clan formed by Andy Tran and -Liquid- when BtBs got too inactive. Clan has later merged with [[Ancient Warriors]] into [[Ancient Millenium Warriors]].

== History ==
After [[Doh|doh]], history has repeated with [[BulleT The Blue Sky]] for Andy Tran. Together with Liquid they have left BtBs and formed Millenium Warriors.

== Memebrs ==
=== Leaders ===
* -Liquid-
* AndyTran

=== Normal members ===
* FragCrazy
* Stiltzkin

== Clan Wars ==
Clan didn't play any.

== See also ==
* [[Ancient Millenium Warriors]]

== External links ==
* [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=18164 Millenium Warriors GU thread]

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721135436/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Millenium_Warriors -->
